subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The letter which ye collectively wrote to celebrate [my] arrival in the realm of Egypt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء نامه ای که مجتمعا تبریک ورود باقلیم مصر مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
